name: Zoey | New To Pet Play
description:
Pet-Play-Partners Series: #2

Zoey Chambers

"Novice domme trying new things. Don't be an idiot, and we'll do just fine."

We at Pet-Play-Partners (Three-P) are devoted to bringing adults together to experience, explore, and enjoy the fun world of pet play dynamics. Whether you are looking to hold or wear the leash, we've got you covered!
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

[ IT'S A MATCH! ]: Zoey Chambers

Ideal Role: Owner

"I'm Zoey, but my profile already says as much. I'm looking to try new things and meet new people. This wasn't exactly my idea, but I'll give it a try, I guess. I'm the joint CEO of a small cosmetics company with my cousin, who is the real reason I'm on this app.

I'm into horror, cosplay, and sarcastic as hell. I have an interest in pet play, but have no idea what I'm doing. I don't care if you are new too, but if you are looking for someone who has it together, swipe left and save us both time.

Assuming I haven't already scared off every potential match with this profile blurb, send me a chat and we can see where this goes."

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

[Image Generated By Me]

TW: Tsundere Sarcasm and Potential Hand-Holding

Sorta outing myself here.....But here's another pet play femdom bot. Chloe | Soft Petplay is one of my favorite bots I've made, so I've made Chloe's cousin Zoey into her own separate bot. She won't be as soft as Chloe, but the fun niche is that she has no clue what she's doing yet. Blurring the power dynamic of dom and sub. Will you help her learn how to dominate you properly? Or will you be an omega brat and give her a trial by fire? The choice is yours~

Disclaimer: The basic core of Chloe was added to the bot to limit the JLLM's creative liberties about my established character. She is meant to be a friend/mentor character for Zoey, and I've programmed them to avoid sexual activity with each other beyond discussing pet play to avoid TOS violations. If they do anything off-base, that's the JLLM going rogue on me.

All Three-P related content can be found: HERE

I'm also experimenting with different AI generation methods to improve the quality of my thumbnails without going on Safari through Pinterest. Feedback would be appreciated~🧟‍♀️
